char:hero.name: {playerName}
char:hero.note: Sprite/palette resolved from the chosen class in config/classes.json

char:shopkeeper.name: Keeper Brindle
char:shopkeeper.note: Village shopkeeper whose first kindness leads into the content-authored counter economy.

char:threadseller.name: Nell Threadseller
char:threadseller.note: Shop regular who gives Hearthwake's counter a lived-in story signal.

char:road-cart-trader.name: Penny Cartwright
char:road-cart-trader.note: Moving Hearthwake road-cart trader who turns the shopfront street into a working storefront.

char:page.name: Page Pip
char:page.note: Village errand-giver who ties the green, shop, and first road together.

char:mara-cress.name: Mara Cress
char:mara-cress.note: Market mender who makes Hearthwake feel inhabited before the road opens.

char:tobin-bell.name: Tobin Bell
char:tobin-bell.note: Notice-board keeper whose advice reinforces the old-fashioned adventure tone.

char:tamsin-hearth.name: Tamsin Hearth
char:tamsin-hearth.note: Village baker who points the opening road toward ordinary Hearthwake life.

char:oswin-hayward.name: Oswin Hayward
char:oswin-hayward.note: Stablehand who turns Hearthwake's lower lane into a social working yard.

char:merrin-underbough.name: Merrin Underbough
char:merrin-underbough.note: Unfurled Vine keeper who ties the tavern hearth, song-board, and story-quilt to the road.

char:hearth-song-board.name: Hearth-Song Board
char:hearth-song-board.note: Readable tavern notice board that starts the Unfurled Vine's small song questlet.

char:village-letter-basket.name: Doorstep Letter
char:village-letter-basket.note: Readable Hearthwake letter-basket that changes Page Pip's morning errand line.

char:oldwood-waystone.name: Mossy Waystone
char:oldwood-waystone.note: Readable Oldwood mile marker that teaches the road's bend before the raiders.

char:hermit.name: Oldwood Hermit
char:hermit.note: Forest quest NPC for the Oldwood oath and raider counter.

char:oldwood-roadward.name: Mabli Greenmantle
char:oldwood-roadward.note: Oldwood roadward who turns Oswin's stable service into a first-road favor.

char:oldwood-thorncutter.name: Hester Briarhook
char:oldwood-thorncutter.note: Moving Oldwood thorncutter who makes the upper hazel pocket feel tended.

char:lost-page.name: Lost Page Rowan
char:lost-page.note: Escort-lite Deep Forest NPC guided by landmark zones.

char:fern-mender.name: Linnet Fernwise
char:fern-mender.note: Deep Forest mender whose walking loop and fern-lamp work make the lower track feel inhabited.

char:desert-pilgrim.name: Pilgrim Safra
char:desert-pilgrim.note: Desert ruins guide who turns the mural into a readable landmark loop.

char:sunken-courier.name: Celia Knotwell
char:sunken-courier.note: Moving Sunken Road courier who turns the shaded layby into a route encounter.

char:sunken-cart-ledger.name: Splintered Cart Ledger
char:sunken-cart-ledger.note: Readable Sunken Road caravan wreck that makes the wash into playable history.

char:castle-scribe.name: Castle Scribe Elowen
char:castle-scribe.note: Castle hall NPC who turns the library and armory into required room verbs before the dungeon.

char:approach-pilgrim.name: Aveline Dustcoat
char:approach-pilgrim.note: Moving Castle Approach pilgrim who replaces the empty west-road exception with a playable warning.
